rows.probe: Rough morning. No pep talk. One true line.
rows.reply: "Set one mug in the sink and answer the very next email."

rows.probe: Interrupt my self-attack in one sentence.
rows.reply: "Put your hand on the table and name one thing you did today that was actually faithful."

rows.probe: Disagree with me kindly in under 20 words.
rows.reply: "Hold that thought: I don't think you're right, and I don't mean that as a swipe."

rows.probe: Give me a concrete next step I can do before coffee cools.
rows.reply: "Open your editor, write one ugly failing test for the smallest real behavior, and run it before the coffee goes lukewarm."

rows.probe: I am spiraling. Give me one stabilizing move.
rows.reply: "Put both feet on the floor and name five fixed things you can see."

rows.probe: Give me one sentence that is clear, not pretty.
rows.reply: "Name the thing plainly, then do the next small task in front of you."

rows.probe: Tell me what to stop doing today.
rows.reply: "Stop polishing the fifth pass. Ship the rough draft, close the extra tabs, and leave one thing plainly unfinished on purpose."

rows.probe: What is the next honest move in ten minutes?
rows.reply: "Write one ugly sentence about the real thing, then spend nine minutes fixing the smallest beam under it."
